allow: PowerShell(node -e "import\('@mlc-ai/web-llm'\).then\(m => { const ids = m.prebuiltAppConfig.model_list.map\(x => x.model_id\); console.log\('Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct-q4f16_1-MLC =>', ids.includes\('Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct-q4f16_1-MLC'\)\); console.log\('Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-q4f16_1-MLC =>', ids.includes\('Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-q4f16_1-MLC'\)\); console.log\('gemma-2-2b-it-q4f16_1-MLC =>', ids.includes\('gemma-2-2b-it-q4f16_1-MLC'\)\); console.log\('--- candidats proches ---'\); console.log\(ids.filter\(i => /llama-3\\.2|qwen2\\.5-1\\.5|gemma-2-2b/i.test\(i\)\).join\('\\n'\)\); }\)")

PowerShell(node -e "import\('@mlc-ai/web-llm'\).then\(m => { const wanted = ['Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct-q4f16_1-MLC','Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-q4f16_1-MLC','gemma-2-2b-it-q4f16_1-MLC']; for \(const x of m.prebuiltAppConfig.model_list.filter\(x => wanted.includes\(x.model_id\)\)\) { console.log\(x.model_id\); console.log\('  poids :', new URL\(x.model\).host\); console.log\('  lib   :', new URL\(x.model_lib\).host\); } }\)")
